# The Voice of Cash — AI Implementation Partner
# https://thevoiceofcash.com
# Las Vegas, Nevada
# Last updated: 2026-02-28

## About
The Voice of Cash is an AI implementation and business automation consultancy based in Las Vegas, Nevada. Founded by Cash Colligan — 30+ years as an internet native, 15+ years guiding businesses through technology transformation. Powered by the Wu-Tang AI Clan: 9 autonomous AI agents running 24/7.

## Services
- AI Agent Programming: Custom autonomous agents for lead generation, customer service, scheduling, and internal operations
- Agentic AI Systems: Multi-agent architectures that execute workflows autonomously without human-in-the-loop
- Hosting & Infrastructure: Secure, scalable hosting for AI systems with ongoing monitoring and optimization
- Month-Over-Month AI Support: Continuous tuning, updates, and strategy
- Process Automation: Identifying and eliminating operational bottlenecks through intelligent automation

## Focus Area
Works exclusively with Las Vegas, Nevada businesses. Industries: hospitality, real estate, home services, legal, healthcare, financial services, retail, professional services.

- Homepage: https://thevoiceofcash.com
